name: SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryReqAC_DIN
title: SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryReqAC_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreatePowerDeliveryReqAC_DIN ( byte SessionID[], long ReadyToChargeState )
description: Creates a Power Delivery Request message for sending, using the AC syntax.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
